text:
Start.
Hi, I want a washing machine under 30,000.
Sure. What will you mainly use it for?
For a family of four, daily washing and some heavy loads.
Do you have any brand preference like LG, Samsung, or Whirlpool?
Not really. Just something durable and energy efficient.
Oh, okay. I can suggest an LG front load and a Samsung top load in that range. Both are good for regular use.
Okay, but I’m not sure if I should buy now.
We currently have a festive offer and EMI options available.
I’ll think about it and get back to you later.
Okay, sure. I’ll share the details with you.
Thank you.

Start.
Looking for a smartphone around 45,000 with great camera.
Mainly for daily use and photos.
Any preference like Apple or Samsung?
Prefer Samsung if the camera is good.
I suggest the Samsung S23 FE, good camera and offers available today.
Do you have EMI?
Yes, no-cost EMI for 6 months.
Great, let me think and I'll confirm.

Start.
I need a 55 inch 4K TV under 70,000 for movies and sports.
Brands? I like LG or Sony.
We have an LG OLED on discount and a Sony Bravia at that price.
Is there any festival offer?
Yes, we have a 10% card offer and EMI.
I'll decide tonight.

Start.
Looking for a 1.5 ton inverter AC around 38,000 for a bedroom.
Any brand preference? Maybe Daikin or LG.
We have LG dual inverter and Daikin models, both in stock.
Is there installation included?
Standard installation is included, offer valid this week.
I will confirm tomorrow.

Start.
Need a double-door refrigerator under 35,000, energy efficient.
Brands? Whirlpool or Samsung preferred.
Recommending Samsung 324L and Whirlpool 300L, both 3-star with offers.
Do you have EMI?
Yes, 9-month no cost EMI.
Okay, share details, I will discuss with family.

Start.
I want a gaming laptop around 90,000 for AAA titles and coding.
No brand bias; maybe ASUS or MSI.
We have ASUS TUF with RTX 4060 and MSI Katana in that range.
Any launch offers?
Yes, 5k instant discount and exchange bonus.
Sounds good, let me check benchmarks and revert.

Start.
Looking for a vacuum cleaner under 12,000, cordless if possible.
Brand? Maybe Dyson too costly, so Philips or Eureka Forbes.
We have Philips cordless at 11,500; EMI available.
Is there any discount today?
Flat 1,000 off today only.
Okay, I will think and let you know.

Start.
Need a microwave oven around 15,000 mainly for reheating and grilling.
Any brand preference? Not really, maybe Panasonic or IFB.
We suggest IFB 25L convection with offer price.
Do you provide demo?
Yes, free demo and EMI options.
Great, send me the quote.

Start.
I want a desktop for video editing under 1,20,000.
Prefer custom build with Ryzen and NVIDIA GPU.
We can configure Ryzen 7 with RTX 4070 and 32GB RAM.
Any offers?
Bank offer 7% and easy EMI available.
Let me compare and come back.

Start.
Looking for a smartwatch under 20,000 with good fitness tracking.
Brands? Thinking Garmin or Samsung.
We recommend Samsung Galaxy Watch and Garmin Venu Sq in that budget.
Is there launch offer?
Yes, limited-time discount till Sunday.
I will decide after checking reviews.

Start.
I need a budget laptop under 45,000 for office work and browsing.
Prefer HP or Lenovo.
We have HP 15s and Lenovo Ideapad Slim in that price.

Yes, 12-month no cost EMI plus card offer.
